verses.text: Itluat aw, na ngaihbaang a, na lu khuhna puan vang panin a ngaihbaang na mit hong te kelkel hi. Gilead mual tunga keelhon diang leklek bangin na samphekte phe velvel hi
Na ha pak singsengte zong a mul a kimet khin phet, a kisawpsiang tuute tawh kibang hi. Na ha khat zong toklo a, a vekpi-in kituak dimdiam hi
Na mukte puansan tawh kibang a, na kampau ngaihnop-huai hi. Na lu khuhna puan sung panin na kho hong san lihleh hi
Na ngawng pen galhangte' zat lum tangzang tul khat a kikhai zeizaina David' tausang tawh kibang hi
Na nawite unok pak lakah a ta khawm helhel sanang nih tawh ahi a, a ta khawm hialhial sakhi peeng tawh ahi zongin a kibang hi
Zingsang huih vot a nun' mateng, zingsang khuavak hong tun' mateng, myrrh paknamtui a omna mualtungah omsuakin, saledi paknamtui lakah ka bual ding hi
Ngaihno aw, na ngaihbaang mahmah a, kawkbaan'na ding na nei kei hi

Ka lawm ngaih aw, Lebanon Mual-ah hong pai in la, Lebanon Mual panin kei hong zui in. Humpinelkaite leh kamkeite a ten'na, Amana Mual dawn panin hong taisuk in la, Senir Mual leh Hermon Mual panin hong paisuk in
Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, na mit hah in ka lung hong kuai a, na khi awh in ka lungsim hong zo hi
Itluat ka lawm ngaih aw, nang tawh kingaih nuam mahmah hi. Na itna leenggahzu sangin khumzaw a, na paknamtui paknamtui dang khempeuh sangin namtui zaw hi
Lawm aw, na muk, khuaizu bangin khum a, na leii, bawngnawi leh khuaizu bang hi. Na puante Lebanon Mual tunga paknamtui namkim a nam hi
Ka lawmnu, ka naunu, a ki-umcip huan hi a, a kinei tuam tuinak ahi hi
Tua huan sungah singkungte hoihtakin khang a, mang kawlsing cin'na huan tawh kibang hi. Singgah limci pente tua lai-ah gah a, henna leh nard sing namtuite tua lai-ah a po hi
Nard sing leh saffron sing, thalsing leh sinnamon kung, a namtui a gah namkim kung po a, myrrh leh aloes, a namtui namkim om hi
Lebanon Mual tung panin tui hong luangsuk a, ciktui luangte, luitui luangte, tua huan sungah a tungsuk hi.
Saklam huih aw, hong nungsuk in la, khanglam huih aw, hong nungto in. Ka huan sungteng hong namtuisak un. Ka ngaihno, ka huanah hong paisak un la, a gah limci pente hong nesak un.
